Stock Innioasis Y2 ATA system keylayouts (reference only — do not install verbatim).
Source: user-provided `reference/original y2 system rom for reference/usr/keylayout/`.

Critical stock mtk-kpd GPIO map (differs from Y1):
  103/108 = DPAD_UP/DOWN   (wheel vertical)
  105/106 = DPAD_LEFT/RIGHT (side buttons)
  163/165 = MEDIA_NEXT/PREVIOUS
  114/115 = VOLUME_UP/DOWN
  116     = POWER

Solar Y2-Rockbox.kl uses the same playbook as Y1
(wheel → MEDIA_PLAY/PAUSE, side → MEDIA_PREVIOUS/NEXT); Y2 scancodes differ (103/108 wheel, 105/106 side).
